text: Ever wondered how some creatures vanish into thin air? Camouflage isn’t just magic; it’s a survival strategy honed over millions of years. From chameleons to cuttlefish, these creatures adapt their colors and patterns to blend in. Research shows that this adaptation enhances their chances against predators. But evolution isn't perfect—environment changes can disrupt these adaptations. Curious about more wonders of nature? Like and follow for fascinating insights!
